race.comment: SETTEVELI (4) was a fraction flat second-up but still produced a sound effort to finish fourth over 1000m here, perhaps already looking for further. That followed a first-up win at this track. Strips fitter third-up and should relish the rise in trip. Gets a key switch in Milnes and looks the one to beat. COSTLESS (3) returns and is a consistent gelding for the Lynch team. Yet to strike fresh but the form around him last time in stacks up strongly and he draws low. Bold showing anticipated. THE WIRRULLA BOY (5) made considerable ground in the run home to finish third last start here when well supported. Solid record here at the trip, winning two races. Expected to be there at the business end. STRAWBERRY SWING (11) was well found again last time but could only finish fifth. Collected two minor placings on end prior and doesn't have to improve much to land the winning blow. GUSMAO (6) warmed nicely late when resuming here. Will appreciate the rise to a pet trip, though will get back.
